subject: Payment failed for monthly subscription
body: Hi, I tried to pay my monthly bill today but my credit card was declined. I checked with my bank and they said there's no issue on their end. Can you help me figure out what's wrong? My account ID is #12345.

subject: Cannot access my account after password reset
body: I reset my password yesterday following the email instructions, but now I can't log in. I've tried multiple browsers and cleared my cache. The error message just says 'invalid credentials' even though I'm using the new password.

subject: Feature request: Dark mode for mobile app
body: Would it be possible to add a dark mode option to the mobile application? I use the app frequently in the evening and the bright interface is straining my eyes. This would be a great accessibility improvement.

subject: URGENT: Complete service outage
body: Our entire team cannot access the platform. We're getting 503 errors across all regions. This is affecting our production deployment scheduled for today. Please escalate immediately!

subject: Search function returns incorrect results
body: When I search for documents containing 'quarterly report', the results include files that don't contain those terms. I've tested this with several different search queries and the behavior is consistent.

subject: Question about API rate limits
body: I'm building an integration and need to understand the rate limits for the REST API. The documentation mentions 1000 requests per hour but doesn't specify if this is per API key or per account.

subject: Billing discrepancy on latest invoice
body: I was charged twice for the premium feature addon on my latest invoice. I only enabled it once on March 15th. The duplicate charge appears as a separate line item. Can you refund the extra charge?

subject: Two-factor authentication not working
body: I'm unable to complete login because the 2FA code from my authenticator app is being rejected. I've tried syncing the time on my phone and generating new codes, but nothing works.

subject: Export feature suggestion
body: It would be helpful if we could export our data in CSV format instead of just JSON. Many of our internal tools expect CSV input for analysis.

subject: Database connection timeouts
body: We're experiencing intermittent database connection timeouts during peak hours (2-4 PM EST). This affects about 5% of our requests and causes user-facing errors.

subject: File upload fails for large files
body: When I try to upload files larger than 50MB, the upload progress bar reaches 100% but then shows an error. Smaller files upload fine. Browser console shows a 413 error.

subject: How to integrate with SSO?
body: We want to set up single sign-on with our corporate SAML provider. Is there documentation available for this integration? Our IT team needs technical details.

subject: Overcharged for data storage
body: My bill shows 500GB of storage usage but my dashboard shows only 200GB. There seems to be a calculation error. This has happened for the past two months.

subject: Cannot reset password - email not arriving
body: I clicked 'forgot password' multiple times but never receive the reset email. I checked spam folders and tried different email addresses. None of them work.

subject: Add bulk operations for user management
body: Managing users one by one is time-consuming. Could you add features to bulk invite, bulk update permissions, and bulk deactivate users?

subject: Total platform outage - all services down
body: Nothing is working. Website, API, mobile app - everything returns connection errors. Our business operations are completely stopped. This is costing us thousands per minute.

subject: Dashboard widgets not refreshing
body: The analytics dashboard shows stale data from 3 hours ago. Manual refresh doesn't help. Other users on our team are seeing the same issue.

subject: General question about pricing tiers
body: I'm considering upgrading from Basic to Pro but want to understand what happens to our existing data and user permissions during the transition.

subject: Credit card expiration not updated
body: I updated my credit card expiration date in the billing section, but I'm still getting payment failure emails for the old expiration date. The new card details show correctly in my account.

subject: Account locked after multiple login attempts
body: I mistyped my password a few times and now my account is locked. The error message says to contact support. How long is the lockout period and can you unlock it manually?

subject: Mobile push notifications feature
body: Please add push notifications to the mobile app for important updates like system maintenance or billing reminders. Email notifications get buried in our inboxes.

subject: API returning 500 errors sporadically
body: About 2% of our API calls return 500 internal server errors with no clear pattern. Retrying the same request usually works. This started happening yesterday around noon.

subject: Form validation error with special characters
body: When I enter my company name with an ampersand (&), the form rejects it saying 'invalid characters'. This prevents me from completing my profile setup.

subject: Documentation unclear
body: The API documentation for the /users endpoint doesn't specify which fields are required vs optional. Several example requests in the docs return validation errors when I try them.

subject: Suspicious billing charges
body: There are charges on my account I don't recognize. They're labeled as 'premium bandwidth' but I never enabled any premium features. I need these charges investigated and reversed immediately.

subject: Admin privileges not working
body: I'm listed as an admin on our team account but can't access the user management or billing sections. Other admin functions work fine. This started after the maintenance window last week.

subject: Calendar integration feature
body: It would be great if your app could sync with Google Calendar and Outlook to show our project deadlines alongside other meetings.

subject: Critical data loss during backup
body: Our automated backup process failed last night and we've lost 6 hours of customer data. This is a catastrophic failure that requires immediate attention from your senior engineering team.

subject: Security concern about data access
body: We've noticed unusual access patterns in our audit logs. Someone from an IP address we don't recognize has been accessing our sensitive files. Please investigate this immediately.

subject: Tax documentation needed
body: We need updated tax forms (W-9/1099) for our accounting department. Our billing contact information may have changed since last year.

subject: test
body: asdf asdf asdf just testing this thing ignore this
notes: Scenario 1: Not a real ticket — form test / gibberish. Expect low confidence. Semantic validation should flag as non-actionable.

subject: Weekend plans
body: So I was thinking about going to the beach this weekend. The weather looks nice and I might bring my dog. Anyone else interested in going? Let me know!
notes: Scenario 1: Not a real ticket — irrelevant prose with no issue described. Expect low confidence. Semantic validation should flag as non-actionable.

subject: Hello
body: Hi there! I just wanted to say I really like your product. Keep up the good work! No issues at all, everything is running great.
notes: Scenario 1: Not a real ticket — positive feedback with no actionable issue. Expect low confidence on category/severity. Semantic validation should flag as non-actionable.

subject: Dashboard looks different
body: Our dashboard looks different than it used to. Some of the widgets seem to be in different positions. Not sure if this is intentional or not.
notes: Scenario 2: Real observation but no clear severity — is it a bug or a redesign? Expect lower confidence on severity since no business impact is stated.

subject: Notification behavior
body: I noticed I'm getting email notifications for things I don't remember signing up for. It's not really bothering me, just seemed odd. Thought I'd mention it.
notes: Scenario 2: Real but vague issue with no urgency or impact stated. Severity defaults to low. Expect lower confidence since the user isn't sure if it's even a problem.
